title: Prisma Next Plugin
description: How Pothos field declarations map to prisma-next orm calls — runs in-browser via sql.js, with live SQL + ORM panels next to the response.

steps.title: Selection-driven SELECT
steps.description: Wire the client, register one prismaObject, expose a list query — and watch the SQL `SELECT` column list track the GraphQL fields you ask for.

steps.title: Relations and includes
steps.description: Add Post + Comment with `t.relation`. Nested selections compile to one `.include(...)` chain; depth-3 includes show the planner's multi-query fallback.

steps.title: Per-field `select` + aggregates
steps.description: Computed fields (`fullName`) declare column deps via `select: [...]`. Aggregates use the function-form `select: { rel: sub => ({ key: sub.count() }) }` — same machinery as `t.relation`.

steps.title: Args, filters, alias `.combine`
steps.description: Top-level `.where(...)` in resolvers; per-field `args` + `query` on `t.relation`. Aliased relations with different args force a `.combine` and the planner's multi-statement fallback.

steps.title: Relay nodes + cursor pagination
steps.description: `prismaNode` registers a batched `node(id:)` loader. `t.relatedConnection` lays cursor pagination over a to-many relation — single-column cursor, backward (`last:`), parallel `totalCount`, and lexicographic compound cursors over `[createdAt, id]`.
